<!-- Thanks for contributing to refaver! -->

## What & why


## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy refaver` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] If this touches the favicon DB/files, I followed the **db-safety-check**
      (backup, `BEGIN EXCLUSIVE`, Safari-quit guard, fixture-only tests).
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes.
